sqlMap.select:
select d.CN as id, IF(d.extensionattribute1=null
or d.CN=#companyId#
,'##',d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1) as parent, d.extensionattribute2 as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as text, case d.CN when d.extensionattribute2 then 'comp' else 'dept' end as isComp, case d.CN when u.DEPARTMENT then 'yes' else 'no' end as myDept from tbl_deptmaster d left join tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.tenant_id = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.tenant_id = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) )
and d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyId#
ORDER BY lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

select d.CN as companyId, d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as companyName, case d.CN when #companyId# then 'selected' else 'no' end as selected from jmocha.tbl_deptmaster d left join jmocha.tbl_usermaster u on d.tenant_id = u.TENANT_ID where d.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and u.CN = #userId# and u.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and ( ((substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 0 and d.extensionattribute2 = u.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME)) or (substr(u.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, 3, 1) = 1) ) and d.extensionattribute2 = d.CN order by lpad(ifnull(d.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15, 0), 6, 0), d.DISPLAYNAME$lang$

select DISPLAYNAME$lang$ as user_name, CN as user_id, TITLE$lang$ as jikwi, MAIL as mail, DESCRIPTION$lang$ as dept_name, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 as user_img from tbl_usermaster where TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
and $key$ = #value#
and $key$ like concat('%',#value#,'%')
and $key$ = #value#
order by lpad(ifnull(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE15,0),6,0) ,DISPLAYNAME$lang$
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_project( tenant_id, project_name, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, head_manager_id, head_manager_name, head_manager_name2, head_manager_deptname, head_manager_deptname2, status, progress, overview, weight_input, creator_id, creator_name, creator_name2, creator_deptname, creator_deptname2, workingday, rest_dueday, alam_mail_status, create_date, mail_repeat ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectName#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #status#, #progress#, #overview#, #weightInput#, #creatorId#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorDeptname#, #creatorDeptname2#, #workingDay#, #restDueday#, #endAlamStatus#, #createDate#, #mailRepeat# )
SELECT last_insert_id()
sqlMap.select:
SELECT GROUP_ID AS id, UPPER_GROUP_ID AS parent, GROUP_NAME AS text, SORT_ORDER AS sort, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_ID, 0 AS TASK_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND DEL_STATUS = 0
AND ISSUEYN = 'N'
ORDER BY ISSUEYN DESC, SORT_ORDER

SELECT CONCAT('t',TASK_ID) AS id, GROUP_ID AS parent, TASK_NAME AS text, SORT_ORDER AS sort, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_ID, TASK_ID FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE PROJECT_ID = #project_Id# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY GROUP_ID, SORT_ORDER

select.isNotEqual:
SELECT M.USER_ID AS USER_ID, M.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, M.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, M.USER_POSITION$lang$ AS USER_POSITION, M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID, M.USER_ID_TYPE, M.TENANT_ID, IFNULL(U.MAIL, D.MAIL) AS USER_MAIL FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER M LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = M.USER_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = M.USER_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID WHERE M.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND
M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = #roleId#
M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2,3)
AND M.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND M.USER_ID_TYPE = 'user' UNION SELECT CN AS USER_ID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, TITLE AS USER_POSITION, C.MEMBER_ROLE_ID AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, C.USER_ID_TYPE AS USER_ID_TYPE, C.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, D.MAIL AS USER_MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER D JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT B.CN AS DEPARTMENT, A.MEMBER_ROLE_ID AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, A.USER_ID_TYPE AS USER_ID_TYPE, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, B.MAIL AS USER_MAIL FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON B.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',A.USER_ID,'%') AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.USER_ID_TYPE = 'dept' AND
MEMBER_ROLE_ID = #roleId#
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2,3)
AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) C ON D.DEPARTMENT = C.DEPARTMENT WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
select.isEqual:
SELECT M.USER_ID AS USER_ID, M.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, M.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, M.USER_POSITION$lang$ AS USER_POSITION, 0 AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, "" AS USER_ID_TYPE, M.TENANT_ID, IFNULL(U.MAIL, D.MAIL) AS USER_MAIL FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER M LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = M.USER_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER D ON D.CN = M.USER_ID AND D.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID WHERE M.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND
M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2)
M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2,3)
AND M.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND M.USER_ID_TYPE = 'user' UNION SELECT CN AS USER_ID, DISPLAYNAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, DESCRIPTION$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, TITLE AS USER_POSITION, 0 AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, "" AS USER_ID_TYPE, C.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, D.MAIL AS USER_MAIL FROM TBL_USERMASTER D JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT B.CN AS DEPARTMENT, A.MEMBER_ROLE_ID AS MEMBER_ROLE_ID, A.USER_ID_TYPE AS USER_ID_TYPE, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER A JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON B.DEPT_CD_PATH LIKE CONCAT('%',A.USER_ID,'%') AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.USER_ID_TYPE = 'dept' AND
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2)
MEMBER_ROLE_ID IN (1,2,3)
AND A.TENANT_ID = 1) C ON D.DEPARTMENT = C.DEPARTMENT WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT * FROM (select A.CN AS userId, A.DISPLAYNAME AS userName, A.DISPLAYNAME2 AS userName2, A.TITLE AS userPosition, A.TITLE2 AS userPosition2, B.DISPLAYNAME AS userDeptname, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS userDeptname2 FROM tbl_usermaster A LEFT JOIN tbl_deptmaster B ON A.department = B.CN AND A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantId# UNION SELECT R.CN, R.DISPLAYNAME, R.DISPLAYNAME2, R.TITLE, R.TITLE2, B2.DISPLAYNAME, B2.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_usermaster_retire R LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B2 ON R.department = B2.cn AND R.tenant_id = B2.tenant_id WHERE R.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT D.CN, D.DISPLAYNAME, D.DISPLAYNAME2, D.TITLE, D.TITLE2, B3.DISPLAYNAME, B3.DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_usermaster_delete D LEFT JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B3 ON D.department = B3.cn AND D.tenant_id = B3.tenant_id WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#) as U WHERE U.userId = #userId#;
select.isNotEqual: SELECT CN AS userId, DISPLAYNAME AS userName, DISPLAYNAME2 AS userName2, " " AS userPosition, " " As userPosition2, DISPLAYNAME AS userDeptname, DISPLAYNAME2 AS userDeptname2 FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND CN = #userId#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_member ( tenant_id, project_id, member_role_id, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2, user_position, user_position2, user_id_type ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #memberRoleId#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptname#, #userDeptname2#, #userPosition#, #userPosition2#, #userIdType# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT remainingWeight, plan_start_date AS projectStartDate, plan_end_date AS projectEndDate, status AS projectStatus, weight_input AS weightInput FROM tbl_pms_project JOIN (SELECT 100 - IFNULL(SUM(weight), 0) AS remainingWeight FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE project_id = #projectId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 ) a WHERE project_id = #projectId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0

SELECT p.setting_id as SETTING_ID, u.tenant_id as TENANT_ID, p.user_id as USER_ID, IFNULL(p.view_type,0) as VIEW_TYPE, IFNULL(p.progress_color,'##438ddd') as PROGRESS_COLOR, IFNULL(p.complete_color,'##63c449') as COMPLETE_COLOR, IFNULL(p.overdue_color,'##dd7238') as OVERDUE_COLOR, IFNULL(p.hold_color,'##57c7b6') as HOLD_COLOR, IFNULL(p.project_sort,0) as PROJECT_SORT, IFNULL(p.list_number,10) as LIST_NUMBER, IFNULL(p.list_project_status, "P") as LIST_PROJECT_STATUS, u.mail as USER_MAIL, u.displayname as USER_NAME, u.displayname2 as USER_NAME2
FROM tbl_usermaster u LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting p ON ( u.CN = p.user_id AND u.tenant_id = p.tenant_id )
FROM tbl_deptmaster u LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting p ON ( u.CN = p.user_id AND u.tenant_id = p.tenant_id )
WHERE u.CN = #userId# AND u.tenant_id = #tenantId# UNION
SELECT P1.setting_id as SETTING_ID, R.tenant_id as TENANT_ID, P1.user_id as USER_ID, IFNULL(P1.view_type,0) as VIEW_TYPE, IFNULL(P1.progress_color,'##438ddd') as PROGRESS_COLOR, IFNULL(P1.complete_color,'##63c449') as COMPLETE_COLOR, IFNULL(P1.overdue_color,'##dd7238') as OVERDUE_COLOR, IFNULL(P1.hold_color,'##57c7b6') as HOLD_COLOR, IFNULL(P1.project_sort,0) as PROJECT_SORT, IFNULL(P1.list_number,10) as LIST_NUMBER, IFNULL(P1.list_project_status, "P") as LIST_PROJECT_STATUS, R.mail as USER_MAIL, R.displayname as USER_NAME, R.displayname2 as USER_NAME2
FROM tbl_usermaster_retire R LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting P1 ON ( R.CN = P1.user_id AND R.tenant_id = P1.tenant_id )
WHERE R.CN = #userId# AND R.tenant_id = #tenantId# UNION
SELECT P2.setting_id as SETTING_ID, D.tenant_id as TENANT_ID, P2.user_id as USER_ID, IFNULL(P2.view_type,0) as VIEW_TYPE, IFNULL(P2.progress_color,'##438ddd') as PROGRESS_COLOR, IFNULL(P2.complete_color,'##63c449') as COMPLETE_COLOR, IFNULL(P2.overdue_color,'##dd7238') as OVERDUE_COLOR, IFNULL(P2.hold_color,'##57c7b6') as HOLD_COLOR, IFNULL(P2.project_sort,0) as PROJECT_SORT, IFNULL(P2.list_number,10) as LIST_NUMBER, IFNULL(P2.list_project_status, "P") as LIST_PROJECT_STATUS, D.mail as USER_MAIL, D.displayname as USER_NAME, D.displayname2 as USER_NAME2
FROM tbl_usermaster_delete D LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_setting P2 ON ( D.CN = P2.user_id AND D.tenant_id = P2.tenant_id )
WHERE D.CN = #userId# AND D.tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT A.PROJECT_ID AS PROJECT_ID, A.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_NAME AS PROJECT_NAME, A.PLAN_START_DATE AS PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE AS PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE AS REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE AS REAL_END_DATE, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID AS HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.STATUS AS STATUS, A.PROGRESS AS PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW AS OVERVIEW, A.WEIGHT_INPUT AS WEIGHT_INPUT, A.CREATOR_ID AS CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.WORKINGDAY AS WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY AS REST_DUEDAY, A.ALAM_MAIL_STATUS AS ALAM_MAIL_STATUS, IFNULL(F.FAVORITE_ID, 0) AS ISFAVORITE, IFNULL(G.GROUP_ID, 0) AS GROUP_ID, A.MAIL_REPEAT AS MAIL_REPEAT FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON A.PROJECT_ID = G.PROJECT_ID AND G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = 0 AND ISSUEYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_MEMBER M ON A.PROJECT_ID = M.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID
LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
WHERE
B.USER_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%') AND
( M.USER_ID = #userId# OR M.USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND
A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.STATUS = #listProjectStatus#
AND (A.STATUS = #listProjectStatus# OR A.STATUS = 'L')
AND A.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY $projectSort$
limit #startCount#, #listNumber#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_task( tenant_id, project_id, group_id, task_name, status, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, real_progress, weight, overview , member_count, head_manager_id, head_manager_name, head_manager_name2, head_manager_deptname, head_manager_deptname2, writer_id, write_date, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2, sort_order, workingday, tree_depth, real_workingday ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupId#, #taskName#, #status#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #realProgress#, #weight#, #overview#, #memberCount#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #writerId#, #writeDate#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptname#, #writerDeptname2#, #sortOrder#, #workingday#, #treeDepth#, #realWorkingday# )
SELECT last_insert_id() as id

INSERT INTO tbl_pms_taskmember ( tenant_id, task_id, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2, pctinput ) VALUES
( #[].tenantId#, #[].taskId#, #[].userId#, #[].userName#, #[].userName2#, #[].userDeptname#, #[].userDeptname2#, #[].pctinput# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET workingday_sum = workingday_sum + #realWorkingday# WHERE project_id = #projectId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET workingday_sum = ( SELECT SUM(real_workingday) FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE project_id = #projectId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND del_status = 0 ) WHERE project_id = #projectId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT workingday_sum FROM tbl_pms_project WHERE project_id = #projectId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET workingday = #workingday#, weight = #weight# WHERE task_id = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(a.sort_order) + 1, 0) FROM (SELECT sort_order FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE group_id = #groupId# UNION SELECT sort_order FROM tbl_pms_group WHERE upper_group_id = #groupId#) a

SELECT COUNT( DISTINCT A.project_id) FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID
JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID
JOIN tbl_pms_member M ON A.PROJECT_ID = M.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID WHERE M.USER_NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%') AND
WHERE
( B.USER_ID = #userId# OR B.USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND
A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.STATUS = #status#
AND (A.STATUS = #status# OR A.STATUS = 'L')
AND B.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1
AND A.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= STR_TO_DATE(#searchByEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_setting ( TENANT_ID, USER_ID, VIEW_TYPE, PROGRESS_COLOR, COMPLETE_COLOR, OVERDUE_COLOR, HOLD_COLOR, PROJECT_SORT, LIST_NUMBER, LIST_PROJECT_STATUS ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #userId#, #viewType#, #progressColor#, #completeColor#, #overdueColor#, #holdColor#, #projectSort#, #listNumber#, #listProjectStatus# )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_pms_setting SET VIEW_TYPE = #viewType#, PROGRESS_COLOR = #progressColor#, COMPLETE_COLOR = #completeColor#, OVERDUE_COLOR = #overdueColor#, HOLD_COLOR = #holdColor#, PROJECT_SORT = #projectSort#, LIST_NUMBER = #listNumber#
, LIST_PROJECT_STATUS = #listProjectStatus#
WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.PROJECT_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_NAME, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.STATUS, A.PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW, A.WEIGHT_INPUT, A.CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY, A.ALAM_MAIL_STATUS, IFNULL(F.FAVORITE_ID, 0) AS ISFAVORITE, IFNULL(G.GROUP_ID, 0) AS GROUP_ID, A.MAIL_REPEAT AS MAIL_REPEAT FROM tbl_pms_project A JOIN tbl_pms_member M ON A.PROJECT_ID = M.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = M.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_favorite F ON A.PROJECT_ID = F.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = F.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON A.PROJECT_ID = G.PROJECT_ID AND G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = 0 AND ISSUEYN = 'N' WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND (M.USER_ID = #userId# OR M.USER_ID = #deptId# )

SELECT DISTINCT A.TASK_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_ID, A.TASK_NAME, A.STATUS, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.WEIGHT, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.WRITER_ID, A.WRITE_DATE, A.WRITER_NAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, A.WRITER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.WORKINGDAY, IFNULL(A.REST_DUEDAY, 0) AS REST_DUEDAY, IFNULL(A.LINK_TASK_ID, 0) AS LINK_TASK_ID, A.DEL_STATUS, D.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, B.PROJECT_NAME, A.REAL_WORKINGDAY, R.PRETASK FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_project B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_member C ON A.PROJECT_ID = C.PROJECT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_group D ON A.GROUP_ID = D.GROUP_ID JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember E ON A.TASK_ID = E.TASK_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, group_concat(pretask separator ',') AS pretask FROM tbl_pms_pretaskrel GROUP BY task_id ) R ON A.TASK_ID = R.TASK_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND (C.USER_ID = #userId# OR C.USER_ID = #deptId# )
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND E.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.STATUS LIKE CONCAT('%',#status#,'%')
AND A.TASK_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#taskName#,'%')
AND D.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#upperGroupName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searhByStartDate#
AND E.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByProjectName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
AND (A.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY PLAN_END_DATE
ORDER BY GROUP_ID, SORT_ORDER
ORDER BY( CASE A.STATUS WHEN 'P' THEN 1 WHEN 'W' THEN 2 WHEN 'L' THEN 3 WHEN 'S' THEN 4 WHEN 'C' THEN 5 END ), PLAN_END_DATE
LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT DISTINCT A.TASK_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_ID, A.TASK_NAME, A.STATUS, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.WEIGHT, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.WRITER_ID, A.WRITE_DATE, A.WRITER_NAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, A.WRITER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, IFNULL(A.REST_DUEDAY, 0) AS REST_DUEDAY, IFNULL(A.LINK_TASK_ID, 0) AS LINK_TASK_ID, A.DEL_STATUS, D.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, B.PROJECT_NAME, A.REAL_WORKINGDAY, R.PRETASK, A.WORKINGDAY, TW.REALSTARTENDDIFF, ( CASE WHEN A.PLAN_START_DATE <= CURDATE() && TW.RESTDUEDAY > 0 THEN (TW.WORKINGDAY - TW.RESTDUEDAY) / TW.WORKINGDAY * 100 WHEN A.PLAN_START_DATE > CURDATE() THEN 0 ELSE 100 END ) AS PLAN_PROGRESS FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_project B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_member C ON A.PROJECT_ID = C.PROJECT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_group D ON A.GROUP_ID = D.GROUP_ID JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember E ON A.TASK_ID = E.TASK_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, group_concat(pretask separator ',') AS pretask FROM tbl_pms_pretaskrel GROUP BY task_id ) R ON A.TASK_ID = R.TASK_ID
JOIN ( SELECT TASK_ID, (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(plan_start_date)), DATEDIFF(plan_end_date, plan_start_date) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) AS WORKINGDAY, (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(ADDDATE(CURDATE(), 1))), DATEDIFF(plan_end_date, ADDDATE(CURDATE(), 1)) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) AS RESTDUEDAY, ( CASE WHEN REAL_PROGRESS = 100 AND REAL_START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND REAL_END_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(real_start_date)), DATEDIFF(real_end_date, real_start_date) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) ELSE 0 END ) AS REALSTARTENDDIFF FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE project_id = #projectId# ) TW ON A.TASK_ID = TW.TASK_ID
JOIN ( SELECT TASK_ID, ( IFNULL(( (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(plan_start_date)), DATEDIFF(plan_end_date, plan_start_date) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) - (SELECT COUNT(a.holiday) FROM (
select #holidayList[]# holiday from dual
) a WHERE DAYOFWEEK(a.holiday) NOT IN (1,7) AND a.holiday BETWEEN plan_start_date AND plan_end_date ) ), 0) ) AS WORKINGDAY, ( IFNULL(( (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(ADDDATE(CURDATE(), 1))), DATEDIFF(plan_end_date, ADDDATE(CURDATE(), 1)) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) - (SELECT COUNT(a.holiday) FROM (
select #holidayList[]# holiday from dual
) a WHERE DAYOFWEEK(a.holiday) NOT IN (1,7) AND a.holiday BETWEEN ADDDATE(CURDATE(), 1) AND plan_end_date ) ), 0) ) AS RESTDUEDAY, ( CASE WHEN STATUS = 'C' THEN (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(real_start_date)), DATEDIFF(real_end_date, real_start_date) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) - (SELECT COUNT(a.holiday) FROM (
select #holidayList[]# holiday from dual
) a WHERE DAYOFWEEK(a.holiday) NOT IN (1,7) AND a.holiday BETWEEN real_start_date AND real_end_date ) ELSE 0 END ) AS REALSTARTENDDIFF FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE project_id = #projectId# ) TW ON A.TASK_ID = TW.TASK_ID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND (C.USER_ID = #userId# OR C.USER_ID = #deptId# )
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND E.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.STATUS LIKE CONCAT('%',#status#,'%')
AND A.TASK_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#taskName#,'%')
AND D.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#upperGroupName#,'%')
AND A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#headManagerName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searhByStartDate#
AND E.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByProjectName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
AND (A.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY PLAN_END_DATE
ORDER BY GROUP_ID, SORT_ORDER
ORDER BY( CASE A.STATUS WHEN 'P' THEN 1 WHEN 'W' THEN 2 WHEN 'L' THEN 3 WHEN 'S' THEN 4 WHEN 'C' THEN 5 END ), PLAN_END_DATE
LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#
SELECT MIN(MEMBER_ROLE_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_MEMBER WHERE ( USER_ID = #userId# OR USER_ID = #deptId# ) AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET STATUS = #status# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET DEL_STATUS = 1 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_favorite (TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, USER_ID) SELECT #tenantId#, #projectId#, #userId# FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, USER_ID FROM TBL_PMS_FAVORITE WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND USER_ID = #userId#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_pms_favorite WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROJECT_ID FROM tbl_pms_favorite WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT T.TASK_MEMBER_ID, T.TENANT_ID, T.TASK_ID, T.USER_ID, T.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, T.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, T.PCTINPUT, U.MAIL AS USER_MAIL FROM tbl_pms_taskmember T LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = T.USER_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID WHERE T.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND TASK_ID = #taskId#

SELECT T.TASK_MEMBER_ID, T.TENANT_ID, T.TASK_ID, T.USER_ID, T.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, T.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, T.PCTINPUT, U.MAIL AS USER_MAIL FROM tbl_pms_taskmember T LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = T.USER_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_TASK A ON T.TASK_ID = A.TASK_ID AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0 AND U.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID WHERE T.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_pms_member WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
DELETE FROM tbl_pms_taskmember WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET
PROJECT_NAME = #projectName#,
WEIGHT_INPUT = #weightInput#,
PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#,
OVERVIEW = #overview#,
ALAM_MAIL_STATUS = #alamMailStatus#,
HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#,
REST_DUEDAY = #restDueday#,
WORKINGDAY = #workingday#,
HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#,
HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2#,
HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#,
HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2#,
MAIL_REPEAT = #mailRepeat#,
PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#
WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE tbl_pms_project SET
REAL_START_DATE = #changeDate#
REAL_END_DATE = #changeDate#, PROGRESS = #progress#, REST_DUEDAY = #restDueday#
WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT KANBAN_ORDER FROM TBL_PMS_MAINLIST WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(group_id) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP
INSERT INTO TBL_PMS_GROUP ( TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_NAME, UPPER_GROUP_ID, PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE, CREATE_DATE, CREATOR_NAME, CREATOR_NAME2, CREATOR_ID, CREATOR_DEPTNAME, CREATOR_DEPTNAME2, REAL_PROGRESS, OVERVIEW, MEMBER_COUNT, HEAD_MANAGER_ID, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2, TREE_DEPTH, ANCESTER_GROUP, SORT_ORDER, DEL_STATUS, WORKINGDAY, REST_DUEDAY, ISSUEYN ) SELECT #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupName#, #upperGroupId#, #planStartDate#, #planEndDate#, #createDate#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorId#, #creatorDeptname#, #creatorDeptname2#, #progress#, #overview#, #memberCount#, #headManagerId#, #headManagerName#, #headManagerName2#, #headManagerDeptname#, #headManagerDeptname2#, #treeDepth#,
CONCAT((SELECT ANCESTER_GROUP FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP AA WHERE group_id=#upperGroupId# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#),',',#groupId#),
#groupId#,
(SELECT IFNULL(MAX(sort_order) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId#),
#sortOrder#,
#delStatus#, #workingDay#, #restDueday#, #isIssue#

INSERT INTO tbl_pms_item_list ( tenant_id, writer_id, title, write_overview, write_type, write_content, write_date, write_update_date, read_count, folder_id, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2, writer_position, writer_position2, doc_no ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #writerId#, #title#, #writeOverview#, #writeType#, #writeContent#, #writeDate#, #writeUpdateDate#, #readCount#, #folderId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #writerPosition#, #writerPosition2#, #docNo# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(max(B.doc_no), 0) FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN TBL_PMS_BOARD_FOLDER F ON F.FOLDER_ID = B.FOLDER_ID WHERE B.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET root_item_id = #itemId# WHERE item_id = #itemId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_item_list ( tenant_id, writer_id, title, write_overview, write_type, write_content, write_date, write_update_date, read_count, folder_id, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2, writer_position, writer_position2, root_item_id, item_level, doc_no, upper_item_id ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #writerId#, #title#, #writeOverview#, #writeType#, #writeContent#, #writeDate#, #writeUpdateDate#, #readCount#, #folderId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2#, #writerPosition#, #writerPosition2#, #rootItemId#, #itemLevel#, #docNo#, #upperItemId# )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET title = #title#, write_overview = #writeOverview#, write_type = #writeType#, write_content = #writeContent#, write_update_date = #writeUpdateDate#, folder_id = #folderId# WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET root_item_id = #itemId#, upper_item_id = null, item_level = 0 WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET folder_id = #folderId# WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET del_status = 1 WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT file_path, file_size, file_name FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT B.item_id, B.title, B.write_overview, B.write_type, B.write_date, B.write_update_date, B.read_count, B.writer_name$lang$ AS writer_name, B.writer_deptname$lang$ AS writer_deptname, IFNULL(A.file_cnt, 0) AS FILE_CNT, B.write_content, B.folder_id, B.root_item_id, B.item_level, B.doc_no, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$ FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_board_folder F ON B.folder_id = F.folder_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT count(file_id) AS file_cnt, item_id FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment GROUP BY item_id) A ON B.item_id = A.item_id WHERE F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0
AND F.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
AND B.writer_name$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND B.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByTitle#,'%')
AND B.write_overview LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.write_date >= #searchByStartDate#
AND B.write_date <= #searchByEndDate#
AND B.write_content LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
ORDER BY
$orderWhat$ $orderHow$,
B.root_item_id DESC, B.item_level ASC, B.item_id DESC
LIMIT #startRow#, #listCnt#

SELECT B.item_id, B.title, B.write_overview, B.write_type, B.write_date, B.write_update_date, B.read_count, B.writer_name$lang$ AS writer_name, B.writer_deptname$lang$ AS writer_deptname, IFNULL(A.file_cnt, 0) AS FILE_CNT, B.write_content, B.folder_id, B.root_item_id, B.item_level, B.doc_no, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$ FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_board_folder F ON B.folder_id = F.folder_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT count(file_id) AS file_cnt, item_id FROM tbl_pms_item_attachment GROUP BY item_id) A ON B.item_id = A.item_id WHERE F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND F.FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND B.del_status = 0 AND B.write_type in (1, 2) ORDER BY B.item_id DESC
LIMIT #startRow#, #listCnt#

SELECT COUNT(item_id) FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_board_folder F ON B.folder_id = F.folder_id WHERE F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0
AND F.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
AND B.writer_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND B.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByTitle#,'%')
AND B.write_overview LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.write_date >= #searchByStartDate#
AND B.write_date <= #searchByEndDate#
AND B.write_content LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')

SELECT COUNT(item_id) FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_board_folder F ON B.folder_id = F.folder_id WHERE F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND F.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0 AND B.write_type in (1, 2)

SELECT B.item_id, B.writer_id, B.title, B.write_overview, B.write_type, B.write_content, B.write_date, B.write_update_date, B.read_count, B.writer_name$lang$ AS writer_name, B.writer_deptname$lang$ AS writer_deptname, B.writer_position$lang$ AS writer_position, M.mobile, B.folder_id, B.root_item_id, B.item_level, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$, F.PROJECT_ID FROM tbl_pms_item_list B JOIN tbl_pms_board_folder F ON B.folder_id = F.folder_id LEFT JOIN tbl_usermaster M on B.writer_id = M.cn and B.tenant_id = M.tenant_id WHERE B.item_id = #itemId# AND B.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND B.del_status = 0 AND F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_item_list SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE item_id = #itemId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_item_read ( tenant_id, project_id, item_id, read_date, user_id, user_name, user_name2, user_deptname, user_deptname2 ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #itemId#, now(), #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptName#, #userDeptName2# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(read_id) FROM tbl_pms_item_read WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_id != #writerId#

SELECT R.read_date, R.user_name$lang$ AS user_name, R.user_deptname$lang$ AS user_deptname, U.title AS position, R.user_id FROM tbl_pms_item_read R LEFT JOIN tbl_usermaster U ON U.CN = R.USER_ID AND R.tenant_id = U.tenant_id WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND R.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND user_id != #writerId# LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_MAINLIST SET KANBAN_ORDER = #orderStatus# WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET GROUP_ID = #groupId#, TASK_NAME = #taskName#, STATUS = #status#, PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, REAL_PROGRESS = #realProgress#, WEIGHT = #weight#, OVERVIEW = #overview#, MEMBER_COUNT = #memberCount#, HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2#, WRITER_ID = #writerId#, WRITE_DATE = #writeDate#, WRITER_NAME = #writerName#, WRITER_NAME2 = #writerName2#, WRITER_DEPTNAME = #writerDeptname#, WRITER_DEPTNAME2 = #writerDeptname2#, SORT_ORDER = #sortOrder#, WORKINGDAY = #workingday# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET STATUS = #status#, REAL_END_DATE = IFNULL(REAL_END_DATE, #realEndDate#), REAL_START_DATE = IFNULL(REAL_START_DATE, #realEndDate#), REAL_PROGRESS = #progress# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.GROUP_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_NAME, A.UPPER_GROUP_ID, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.DEL_STATUS, A.WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY, P.PROJECT_NAME, B.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(WEIGHT), 0) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID = A.GROUP_ID OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%\,',A.GROUP_ID,',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(A.GROUP_ID,',%') ) ) AS WEIGHT, ( SELECT COUNT(TASK_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID = A.GROUP_ID OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%\,',A.GROUP_ID,',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(A.GROUP_ID,',%') ) ) AS TASKLISTCOUNT, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM((100 - REAL_PROGRESS) * (WEIGHT / 100)), 0) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND STATUS = 'L' AND GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID = A.GROUP_ID OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%\,',A.GROUP_ID,',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(A.GROUP_ID,',%') ) ) AS LATEPERCENT FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP A JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.UPPER_GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID
JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M ON A.GROUP_ID = M.GROUP_ID AND M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1 LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M2 ON A.GROUP_ID = M2.GROUP_ID AND
A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND M.USER_ID = #userId#
AND M2.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND A.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByGroupName#, '%')
AND B.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUpperGroupName#, '%')
AND M2.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUser#, '%')
AND P.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByProjectName#, '%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByOverview#, '%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searchByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
limit #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT DISTINCT A.GROUP_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_NAME, A.UPPER_GROUP_ID, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.DEL_STATUS, A.WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY, P.PROJECT_NAME, B.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, TW.REALSTARTENDDIFF, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM(WEIGHT), 0) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID = A.GROUP_ID OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%\,',A.GROUP_ID,',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(A.GROUP_ID,',%') ) ) AS WEIGHT, ( SELECT COUNT(TASK_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID = A.GROUP_ID OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%\,',A.GROUP_ID,',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(A.GROUP_ID,',%') ) ) AS TASKLISTCOUNT, ( SELECT IFNULL(SUM((100 - REAL_PROGRESS) * (WEIGHT / 100)), 0) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND STATUS = 'L' AND GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 AND GROUP_ID = A.GROUP_ID OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%\,',A.GROUP_ID,',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(A.GROUP_ID,',%') ) ) AS LATEPERCENT FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP A JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.UPPER_GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID
JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M ON A.GROUP_ID = M.GROUP_ID AND M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1 LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M2 ON A.GROUP_ID = M2.GROUP_ID AND
A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID
JOIN ( SELECT GROUP_ID, ( CASE WHEN REAL_PROGRESS = 100 AND REAL_START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND REAL_END_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(real_start_date)), DATEDIFF(real_end_date, real_start_date) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) ELSE 0 END ) AS REALSTARTENDDIFF FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE project_id = #projectId# ) TW ON A.GROUP_ID = TW.GROUP_ID
JOIN ( SELECT GROUP_ID, ( CASE WHEN REAL_PROGRESS = 100 AND REAL_START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND REAL_END_DATE IS NOT NULL THEN (LENGTH(REPLACE(RPAD(SUBSTR('~23456~', DAYOFWEEK(real_start_date)), DATEDIFF(real_end_date, real_start_date) + 1, '~23456~'), '~', ''))) - (SELECT COUNT(a.holiday) FROM (
select #holidayList[]# holiday from dual
) a WHERE DAYOFWEEK(a.holiday) NOT IN (1,7) AND a.holiday BETWEEN real_start_date AND real_end_date ) ELSE 0 END ) AS REALSTARTENDDIFF FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE project_id = #projectId# ) TW ON A.GROUP_ID = TW.GROUP_ID
WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND M.USER_ID = #userId#
AND M2.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND A.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByGroupName#, '%')
AND B.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUpperGroupName#, '%')
AND M2.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUser#, '%')
AND P.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByProjectName#, '%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByOverview#, '%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searchByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
ORDER BY A.SORT_ORDER
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
limit #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT DISTINCT A.TASK_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_ID, A.TASK_NAME, A.STATUS, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.WEIGHT, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.WRITER_ID, A.WRITE_DATE, A.WRITER_NAME$lang$ AS WRITER_NAME, A.WRITER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS WRITER_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, B.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.WORKINGDAY, IFNULL(A.REST_DUEDAY, 0) AS REST_DUEDAY, IFNULL(A.LINK_TASK_ID, 0) AS LINK_TASK_ID, A.DEL_STATUS, B.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, P.PROJECT_NAME, A.REAL_WORKINGDAY, R.PRETASK, B.TREE_DEPTH AS UPPER_TREE_DEPTH FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_group B ON A.GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, group_concat(pretask separator ',') AS pretask FROM tbl_pms_pretaskrel GROUP BY task_id ) R ON A.TASK_ID = R.TASK_ID WHERE A.TASK_ID = #taskId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.TASK_ID) FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_project B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_member C ON A.PROJECT_ID = C.PROJECT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_group D ON A.GROUP_ID = D.GROUP_ID JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember E ON A.TASK_ID = E.TASK_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND (C.USER_ID = #userId# OR C.USER_ID = #deptId# )
AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND E.USER_ID = #userId#
AND A.STATUS = #status#
AND D.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#upperGroupName#,'%')
AND A.TASK_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#taskName#,'%')
AND E.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByOverview#,'%')
AND B.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByProjectName#,'%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searhByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
AND (A.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR D.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PMS_LOG ( TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID, GROUP_ID, TASK_ID, LOG_DATE, LOG_STATUS, USER_NAME, USER_NAME2, USER_DEPTNAME, USER_DEPTNAME2, LOG_CONTENT, USER_ID ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #projectId#, #groupId#, #taskId#, #logDate#, #logStatus#, #userName#, #userName2#, #userDeptname#, #userDeptname2#, #logContent#, #userId# )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(L.LOG_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_LOG L JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON L.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON L.GROUP_ID = G.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_TASK T ON L.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID
WHERE (L.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
WHERE L.task_id = #taskId#
AND L.LOG_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
AND L.LOG_STATUS = #searchByStatus#
AND L.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT L.LOG_ID AS LOG_ID, L.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, L.PROJECT_ID AS PROJECT_ID, L.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID, L.TASK_ID AS TASK_ID, DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(LOG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE) as LOG_DATE, L.LOG_STATUS AS LOG_STATUS, L.USER_ID AS USER_ID, L.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, L.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, L.LOG_CONTENT AS LOG_CONTENT, G.GROUP_NAME AS GROUP_NAME, T.TASK_NAME AS TASK_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_LOG L JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON L.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP G ON L.GROUP_ID = G.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_TASK T ON L.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID WHERE L.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
AND (L.GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR G.UPPER_GROUP_ID IN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId# ) )
AND L.task_id = #taskId#
AND L.LOG_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
AND L.LOG_STATUS = #searchByStatus#
ORDER BY $orderWhat$ $orderHow$
ORDER BY LOG_ID DESC
limit #startCount#, #listNumber#
SELECT 1 FROM tbl_pms_item_read WHERE item_id = #itemId# AND user_id = #userId#

SELECT PROJECT_ID, TENANT_ID, PROJECT_NAME, PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE, REAL_START_DATE, REAL_END_DATE, HEAD_MANAGER_ID, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, STATUS, PROGRESS, OVERVIEW, WEIGHT_INPUT, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, WORKINGDAY, REST_DUEDAY, ALAM_MAIL_STATUS, 0 AS ISFAVORITE, 0 AS GROUP_ID, MAIL_REPEAT FROM TBL_PMS_PROJECT WHERE STATUS = #status#

select A.status, count(*) as count from tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_PMS_PROJECT B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID WHERE A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0 GROUP BY A.STATUS
SELECT TASK_MEMBER_ID FROM TBL_PMS_TASKMEMBER WHERE USER_ID = #userId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET DEL_STATUS = 1 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT FILE_PATH AS filePath, FILE_NAME AS fileName FROM TBL_PMS_ITEM_ATTACHMENT WHERE ITEM_ID = #itemId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET GROUP_ID = #groupId#, TASK_NAME = #taskName#, STATUS = #status#, WEIGHT = #weight#, OVERVIEW = #overview#, MEMBER_COUNT = #memberCount#, HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2#, PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, TREE_DEPTH = #treeDepth# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(A.GROUP_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP A JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.UPPER_GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M ON A.GROUP_ID = M.GROUP_ID AND M.MEMBER_ROLE_ID = 1 LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER M2 ON A.GROUP_ID = M2.GROUP_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = M2.TENANT_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0
AND A.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByGroupName#, '%')
AND B.GROUP_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUpperGroupName#, '%')
AND M2.USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByUser#, '%')
AND M2.USER_ID = #userId#
AND P.PROJECT_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByProjectName#, '%')
AND A.OVERVIEW LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchByOverview#, '%')
AND A.PLAN_START_DATE >= #searchByStartDate#
AND A.PLAN_END_DATE <= #searchByEndDate#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, REAL_WORKINGDAY = #realWorkingday#,
STATUS = #status#,
REAL_START_DATE = #realStartDate#,
REAL_END_DATE = #realEndDate#,
REAL_END_DATE = null,
REAL_PROGRESS = #realProgress# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO tbl_pms_groupmember( TENANT_ID, GROUP_ID, USER_ID, USER_NAME, USER_NAME2, USER_DEPTNAME, USER_DEPTNAME2, MEMBER_ROLE_ID ) VALUES
( #[].tenantId#, #[].groupId#, #[].userId#, #[].userName#, #[].userName2#, #[].userDeptname#, #[].userDeptname2#, #[].memberRoleId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(MIN(A.MEMBER_ROLE_ID), 2) FROM TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER A JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #userId# AND A.GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND B.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET DEL_STATUS = 1 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_PMS_PRETASKREL (
PRETASK, TASK_ID,
PREGROUP, TASK_ID,
PRETASK, GROUP_ID,
PREGROUP, GROUP_ID,
TENANT_ID, PROJECT_ID ) VALUES ( #pretaskId#, #taskId#, #tenantId#, #projectId# )
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_PMS_PRETASKREL SET
PRETASK = #pretaskId#, PREGROUP = null WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId#
PRETASK = null, PREGROUP = #pretaskId# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId#
PRETASK = #pretaskId#, PREGROUP = null WHERE GROUP_ID = #taskId#
PRETASK = null, PREGROUP = #pretaskId# WHERE GROUP_ID = #taskId#
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PMS_PRETASKREL WHERE
TASK_ID = #taskId#
TASK_ID = #taskId#
GROUP_ID = #groupId#
GROUP_ID = #groupId#
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.delete:
DELETE FROM TBL_PMS_PRETASKREL WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId#
AND pretask = #pretaskId#
AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND pretaskrel_id > 0
DELETE FROM TBL_PMS_PRETASKREL WHERE GROUP_ID = #taskId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND pretaskrel_id > 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT TASK_ID FROM TBL_PMS_PRETASKREL WHERE PRETASK = #rowIndex# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT C.comment_id, C.update_date, C.comment_content, C.writer_id, C.write_date, C.writer_name$lang$ AS writer_name, C.writer_deptname$lang$ AS writer_deptname, T.task_name, C.task_id, C.group_id, G.group_name FROM tbl_pms_comment C LEFT JOIN tbl_pms_task T ON C.task_id = T.task_id JOIN tbl_pms_group G ON C.group_id = G.group_id WHERE
C.task_id = #taskId#
(C.group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id IN (select group_id from tbl_pms_group where upper_group_id = #groupId#))
AND C.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.del_status = 0
AND C.writer_name$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND C.write_date >= #searchByStartDate#
AND C.write_date <= #searchByEndDate#
AND C.comment_content LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
ORDER BY
$orderWhat$ $orderHow$,
C.comment_id DESC
LIMIT #startRow#, #limit#

SELECT count(comment_id) FROM tbl_pms_comment C JOIN tbl_pms_group G ON C.group_id = G.group_id WHERE
C.task_id = #taskId#
(C.group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id IN (select group_id from tbl_pms_group where upper_group_id = #groupId#))
(C.group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id = #groupId# OR G.upper_group_id IN (select group_id from tbl_pms_group where upper_group_id = #groupId#))
AND C.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND C.del_status = 0
AND C.writer_name$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByUser#,'%')
AND C.write_date >= #searchByStartDate#
AND C.write_date <= #searchByEndDate#
AND C.comment_content LIKE CONCAT('%',#searchByContent#,'%')
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_pms_comment ( tenant_id, task_id, group_id, update_date, comment_content, writer_id, write_date, writer_name, writer_name2, writer_deptname, writer_deptname2 ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #taskId#, #groupId#, #updateDate#, #commentContent#, #writerId#, #writeDate#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #writerDeptName#, #writerDeptName2# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_pms_comment SET del_status = 1 WHERE comment_id = #commentId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_comment SET update_date = now(), comment_content = #commentContent# WHERE comment_id = #commentId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT gm.GROUP_MEMBER_ID, gm.USER_ID, gm.USER_NAME, gm.USER_NAME2, gm.USER_DEPTNAME, gm.USER_DEPTNAME2, gm.MEMBER_ROLE_ID, gm.TENANT_ID, gm.GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER gm JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP g ON gm.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID AND gm.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# WHERE g.PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
AND gm.GROUP_ID = #groupId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET SORT_ORDER = #sortOrder# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET SORT_ORDER = #sortOrder# WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.GROUP_ID, A.TENANT_ID, A.PROJECT_ID, A.GROUP_NAME, A.UPPER_GROUP_ID, A.PLAN_START_DATE, A.PLAN_END_DATE, A.REAL_START_DATE, A.REAL_END_DATE, A.REAL_PROGRESS, A.OVERVIEW, A.MEMBER_COUNT, A.HEAD_MANAGER_ID, A.HEAD_MANAGER_NAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_NAME, A.HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME, A.CREATOR_ID, A.CREATE_DATE, A.CREATOR_NAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_NAME, A.CREATOR_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS CREATOR_DEPTNAME, A.TREE_DEPTH, A.ANCESTER_GROUP, A.SORT_ORDER, A.DEL_STATUS, A.WORKINGDAY, A.REST_DUEDAY, P.PROJECT_NAME, B.GROUP_NAME AS UPPER_GROUP_NAME, IFNULL(B.TREE_DEPTH, -1) AS UPPER_TREE_DEPTH FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP A JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON A.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP B ON A.UPPER_GROUP_ID = B.GROUP_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND A.GROUP_ID = #groupId#

SELECT sum(weight) FROM tbl_pms_task a JOIN ( SELECT group_id FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP where tenant_id = #tenantId# and del_status = 0 and group_id = #groupId# or ancester_group like concat('%\,',#groupId#,',%') or ancester_group like concat(#groupId#,',%') ) b on a.group_id = b.group_id and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND a.DEL_STATUS = 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET GROUP_NAME = #groupName#, OVERVIEW = #overview#, HEAD_MANAGER_ID = #headManagerId#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME = #headManagerName#, HEAD_MANAGER_NAME2 = #headManagerName2#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME = #headManagerDeptname#, HEAD_MANAGER_DEPTNAME2 = #headManagerDeptname2#, UPPER_GROUP_ID = #upperGroupId# WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET WEIGHT = #weight# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET GROUP_ID = #toGroupId#, TREE_DEPTH = #treeDepth# WHERE TASK_ID = #targetTaskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT sum(weight) FROM tbl_pms_task a WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND project_id = #projectId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, WORKINGDAY = #workingday# WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select min(aa.plan_start_date) as planStartDate, max(aa.plan_end_date) as planEndDate from ( select a.plan_start_date, a.plan_end_date from tbl_pms_task a join ( select group_id from tbl_pms_group where group_id IN ( select group_id from tbl_pms_group where group_id = #groupId# OR ancester_group like concat('%,',#groupId#,',%') OR ancester_group like concat(#groupId#,',%') ) and tenant_id = #tenantId# and del_status = 0 ) b on a.group_id = b.group_id and a.tenant_id = #tenantId# and a.del_status = 0 ) aa
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET REAL_PROGRESS = #realProgress#,
REAL_END_DATE = #realEndDate#,
REAL_END_DATE = null,
STATUS = #status# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ANCESTER_GROUP FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_PMS_PROJECT SET PROGRESS = ( SELECT IFNULL(aa.PROGRESS, 0) FROM ( SELECT SUM(a.REAL_PROGRESS * a.WEIGHT / 100) AS PROGRESS FROM TBL_PMS_TASK a JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT b on a.PROJECT_ID = b.PROJECT_ID AND a.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND a.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND a.DEL_STATUS = 0 ) aa
) WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select min(aa.plan_start_date) as planStartDate, max(aa.plan_end_date) as planEndDate from ( SELECT plan_start_date, plan_end_date from tbl_pms_task WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0 ) aa
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_PROJECT SET PLAN_START_DATE = #planStartDate#, PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate#, WORKINGDAY = #workingday# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROGRESS FROM TBL_PMS_PROJECT WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT M.task_id, M.user_id, T.plan_start_date, T.plan_end_date, M.USER_NAME$lang$, M.user_deptname$lang$ FROM tbl_pms_task T JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember M ON T.task_id = M.task_id WHERE T.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND T.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND T.DEL_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY M.USER_ID
SELECT task_id, plan_start_date, plan_end_date, real_start_date, real_end_date, status FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND del_status = 0

SELECT DISTINCT TASK_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_TASK T JOIN TBL_PMS_TASKMEMBER M ON T.TASK_ID = M.TASK_ID WHERE T.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND T.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND M.USER_ID = #selUserId# AND T.PLAN_START_DATE <= #date# AND T.PLAN_END_DATE >= #date#

SELECT COUNT(item_id) FROM tbl_pms_item_list
#itemIds[]#
AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND del_status = 0

SELECT a.PLAN_START_DATE as planStartDate, a.PLAN_END_DATE as planEndDate FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP a JOIN TBL_PMS_GROUP b ON a.GROUP_ID = b.UPPER_GROUP_ID WHERE b.GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND b.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT UPPER_GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
SELECT PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE FROM TBL_PMS_TASK WHERE task_id = #taskId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
SELECT PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT tm.TASK_MEMBER_ID, tm.TENANT_ID, tm.TASK_ID, tm.USER_ID, tm.USER_NAME$lang$ AS USER_NAME, tm.USER_DEPTNAME$lang$ AS USER_DEPTNAME, tm.PCTINPUT, U.MAIL AS USER_MAIL FROM TBL_PMS_TASKMEMBER tm LEFT JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON U.CN = tm.USER_ID AND U.TENANT_ID = tm.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_PMS_TASK t ON tm.TASK_ID = t.TASK_ID AND tm.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND t.DEL_STATUS = 0 JOIN ( SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE (GROUP_ID = #groupId# OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT('%,', #groupId#, ',%') OR ANCESTER_GROUP LIKE CONCAT(#groupId#, ',%')) AND TENANT_ID = 1 ) g ON t.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID;
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PMS_GROUPMEMBER WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET plan_start_date = CASE
WHEN task_id = #taskSchedules[].taskId# THEN #taskSchedules[].start#
END, plan_end_date = CASE
WHEN task_id = #taskSchedules[].taskId# THEN #taskSchedules[].end#
END, real_workingday = CASE
WHEN task_id = #taskSchedules[].taskId# THEN #taskSchedules[].duration#
END
#taskSchedules[].taskId#
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#

UPDATE tbl_pms_group SET plan_start_date = CASE
WHEN group_id = #groupSchedules[].groupId# THEN #groupSchedules[].start#
END, plan_end_date = CASE
WHEN group_id = #groupSchedules[].groupId# THEN #groupSchedules[].end#
END, workingday = CASE
WHEN group_id = #groupSchedules[].groupId# THEN #groupSchedules[].duration#
END
#groupSchedules[].groupId#
AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET status = 'L' WHERE status = 'P' AND del_status = 0 AND plan_end_date < #UTCTime#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET PLAN_END_DATE = #planEndDate# WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE tbl_pms_task SET WEIGHT = ( REAL_WORKINGDAY / #workingdaySum# ) * 100 WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT WEIGHT_INPUT FROM TBL_PMS_PROJECT WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0

SELECT COUNT(T.TASK_ID) FROM TBL_PMS_TASK T JOIN TBL_PMS_TASKMEMBER M ON M.TASK_ID = T.TASK_ID AND M.TENANT_ID = T.TENANT_ID WHERE T.PLAN_START_DATE <= #searchDate# AND T.PLAN_END_DATE >= #searchDate# AND M.USER_ID = #memberId# AND T.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND T.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND T.DEL_STATUS = 0

SELECT (CASE WHEN ISREPEAT = 1 THEN date_format(HOLIDAYDATE, '%m-%d') ELSE date_format(HOLIDAYDATE, '%Y-%m-%d') END ) AS HOLIDAY, ISSOLAR, ISREPEAT, HOLIDAYNAME$lang$ AS HOLIDAY_NAME FROM TBL_HOLIDAYLIST WHERE ((HOLIDAYDATE >= #planStartDate# AND HOLIDAYDATE <= #planEndDate#) OR (ISREPEAT = 1)) AND ISREST = 1 AND ISUSE = 1 AND USECOMPANY = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# UNION SELECT HOLIDAY, SOLARLUNAR AS ISSOLAR, 1 AS ISREPEAT, HOLIDAY_NAME$lang$ AS HOLIDAY_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_FIXEDHOLIDAY WHERE COUNTRY = #country#

SELECT F.FOLDER_ID, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$ AS FOLDER_NAME, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$ AS FOLDER_NAME2, F.FOLDER_ORDER, F.PROJECT_ID, F.CREATOR_ID, P.PROJECT_NAME$lang$ AS PROJECT_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_BOARD_FOLDER F JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON F.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID WHERE F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND F.DEL_STATUS = 0

SELECT F.FOLDER_ID, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$ AS FOLDER_NAME, F.FOLDER_NAME$lang$ AS FOLDER_NAME2, F.FOLDER_ORDER, F.PROJECT_ID, F.CREATOR_ID, P.PROJECT_NAME$lang$ AS PROJECT_NAME FROM TBL_PMS_BOARD_FOLDER F JOIN TBL_PMS_PROJECT P ON F.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID AND F.TENANT_ID = P.TENANT_ID WHERE F.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND F.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND F.FOLDER_ID = #folderId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PMS_BOARD_FOLDER ( TENANT_ID, FOLDER_NAME, FOLDER_NAME2, PROJECT_ID, CREATOR_ID, FOLDER_ORDER ) VALUES ( #tenantId#, #folderName#, #folderName2#, #projectId#, #creatorId#, #folderOrder# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PMS_BOARD_FOLDER SET FOLDER_NAME = #folderName#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #folderName2# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND FOLDER_ID = #folderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET TASK_NAME = #taskName# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET GROUP_NAME = #groupName# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_PROJECT SET PROJECT_NAME = #projectName# WHERE PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
UPDATE TBL_PMS_TASK SET REAL_END_DATE = #realEndDate# WHERE TASK_ID = #taskId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.TASK_ID) FROM tbl_pms_task A JOIN tbl_pms_project B ON A.PROJECT_ID = B.PROJECT_ID AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_member C ON A.PROJECT_ID = C.PROJECT_ID JOIN tbl_pms_group D ON A.GROUP_ID = D.GROUP_ID JOIN tbl_pms_taskmember E ON A.TASK_ID = E.TASK_ID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.DEL_STATUS = 0 AND A.PROJECT_ID = #projectId# AND (A.PLAN_END_DATE > #planEndDate# OR A.PLAN_START_DATE < #planStartDate# )

SELECT MIN(real_start_date) AS realStartDate, max(real_end_date) AS realEndDate FROM tbl_pms_task WHERE group_id in (select group_id from tbl_pms_group where (group_id = #groupId# OR upper_group_id = #groupId# OR UPPER_GROUP_ID IN (SELECT GROUP_ID FROM TBL_PMS_GROUP WHERE UPPER_GROUP_ID = #groupId#))) AND del_status = 0 AND tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_PMS_GROUP SET
REAL_START_DATE = #realStartDate#
REAL_START_DATE = null
, REAL_END_DATE = #realEndDate#
, REAL_END_DATE = null
WHERE GROUP_ID = #groupId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND DEL_STATUS = 0
sqlMap.select: select progress from tbl_pms_project where project_id = #projectId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND del_status = 0
